series_metadata.series_description: The Minutes of Section Staff Meetings are reports of weekly/monthly meetings; which include supporting records documenting internal policy decisions, agendas, discussions surrounding the agenda items, and matters affecting the staff.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years, review by the State Archives for their possible retention or destruction. ; Paper: Retain 2 years, review by the State Archives for their possible retention or destruction., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
